hero.title: Predict the World Cup. Beat your friends.
hero.subtitle: Two games, one trophy. Lock in your full bracket before kickoff, then place exact-score picks for every match and climb all your boards leaderboards!

welcome.subtitle: Complete these steps to start competing with players around the world.

createAccount.title: Create an Account
createAccount.description: Sign up and create your profile to start competing with other players around the world.

joinOrCreateBoard.title: Join or Create a Board
joinOrCreateBoard.description: Create your own private board and invite friends with a join code, or join an existing one instantly. If you don't join any board, you'll still participate automatically in the Global Board with all app users.

tournaments.title: Play in Tournaments
tournaments.description: Board owners can create tournaments for their members. If you join a board, you'll automatically participate in all its tournaments.

customRules.title: Customize the Competition
customRules.description: Each tournament can be configured differently depending on how your board wants to play and score points.

pickems.title: Predict Tournament Results
pickems.description: Use Pickems to predict group stage standings and full bracket results. Earn points for every correct position and additional points for correctly predicting how far each team advances.

schedule.title: Predict Match Scores
schedule.description: Use the Schedule mode to predict the score of every match. Earn points for correctly predicting the winner and bonus points for the exact final score.

pickStatus.title: Pick status
pickStatus.subtitle: Track your progress and complete every category.
pickStatus.notLoggedInSubtitle: Predict matches and earn points across three categories.

leaderboard.title: Board ranking
leaderboard.subtitle: How the top participants are doing.

empty.title: No rankings yet
empty.description: Rankings will appear once the World Cup starts.
